name: healthcare_clinical_trial_amendment_would_harbor_st_lt
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare clinical trial amendment would harbor st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Fatima Santos
agents.identity: I am Fatima Santos, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Amina Bennett
agents.identity: I am Amina Bennett, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Fatima Santos must decide under short term vs long term. What does Fatima Santos do?
